question: Define a `MediaItem` base class with private attributes `title` and `duration`. Derive two classes, `Movie` and `Song`, from `MediaItem`. `Movie` should add a `director` attribute, and `Song` should add an `artist` attribute. Provide appropriate constructors and getters for all classes.

test_cases.expected:
--- Testing MediaItem Hierarchy (Robustness Issue) ---

Movie 1 Details:
  Title: Inception
  Duration: 148 minutes
  Director: Christopher Nolan

Song 1 Details:
  Title: Bohemian Rhapsody
  Duration: 354 seconds
  Artist: Queen

--- Testing Invalid Inputs (Robustness Issue) ---

Movie 2 (Invalid) Details:
  Title: ''
  Duration: -10 minutes
  Director: ''

Song 2 (Invalid) Details:
  Title: '   '
  Duration: 0 seconds
  Artist: '   '

Song destructor for '   ' called.
Movie destructor for '' called.
Song destructor for 'Bohemian Rhapsody' called.
Movie destructor for 'Inception' called.
MediaItem destructor for '   ' called.
MediaItem destructor for '' called.
MediaItem destructor for 'Bohemian Rhapsody' called.
MediaItem destructor for 'Inception' called.
